content.full_text:
January 31, 1977

Mrs. Dorothy Outwater  
Alhambra City Clerk  
111 South 1st Street  
Alhambra, California 91801

Dear Mrs. Outwater:

This letter is to confirm my advice to you by telephone on January 24, 1977, regarding the filing of statements of economic interests under Government Code Section 87203.

In 2 Cal. Adm. Code Section 18723(a), the Commission established April 1 as the deadline for city council members to file statements pursuant to Government Code Section 87203. Prior to the effectiveness of the regulation, however, such statements were due within thirty days of the officeholder's anniversary date. Therefore, since December 1 was the date on which Alhambra city council members took office, they filed their annual statements by December 31, 1977. You asked whether their reports should be supplemented, in light of Section 18723, to include financial activity during the period from December 1 through December 31, 1976. I advised that a supplemental filing would not be necessary; rather the period covered by council members' reports due by April 1, 1978, should be from December 2, 1976 through December 31, 1977.

If you have any questions concerning the above advice, please contact me.

Sincerely,

Nan Emmerson  
Special Compliance Representative

CONCLUSION: No supplemental filing is necessary. Instead, the period covered by council members' reports due by April 1, 1978, should span from December 2, 1976 through December 31, 1977, ensuring continuous coverage without duplication.
